name: Carbene
description: A Bandit assault rifle variant tuned with Dahl-like handling. It gives up some damage for better accuracy and recoil control, making it more dependable for controlled bursts than most Bandit rifles.
notes: It is obtained as a regular world drop from suitable loot sources. Internally, it is listed as "Carbinated Carbene," with the first word functioning as a swappable prefix.
